    About

    I am a Georgia Tech M.S. Analytics student in the Computational Data Science track. I have a background in Applied Mathematics and Statistics from Stony Brook University. I work primarily in Python, R, and SQL, and I am currently seeking data science, analytics, and machine learning internship or full-time opportunities.

    Education

    • Georgia Tech - M.S. Analytics (Computational Data Science) - Expected May 2027
    • Stony Brook University - B.S. Applied Mathematics & Statistics - Graduated May 2025

    Contact

    email me at hylin0517@gmail.com

    Or reach out to me on LinkedIn.
